rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs First, Second, Third, And Fifth Causes Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT M-J SF INVESTMENTS, LLC, JAMES NUNEMACHER, MICHAEL CASSIDY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs First, Second, Third, And Fifth Causes Of Action is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden on the statute of limitations and opposition failed to create a triable issue of fact with admissible evidence. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY MA ET AL VS. PATRICK FOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order As To Defendant North Point Ocean Partners, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MA, RYAN GIN, MICHAEL LUU Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order As To Defendant North Point Ocean Partners, Llc is continued to December 3, 2019. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers by 4:00pm on November 15, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of opposition, reply and errata. = (501/CFH)
